meaning: adj.易受影响的,易感动的,容许...的n.(因缺乏免疫力而)易得病的人
examples: James was extremely susceptible to flattery.
Young people are the most susceptible to advertisements.
Like seaweed, sea grasses are very susceptible to human pollution.
And Japan issues more long-term debt, making it less susceptible to swings in market confidence.
We all know that the poorest among us are the most susceptible to predatory lending.
